Off Calendar Aug-12-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SUTTER BAY HOSPITALS's Motion for Summary Judgment Or Summary Adjudication In The Alternative.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. On July 8, 2022, the court struck this motion from the calendar because it was not filed and served in a timely fashion.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Defendant'S Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The
Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues;
Off Calendar Jul-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BARUCH KREIMAN, Esq. of Abramson Labor Group (Tel: 213-493-6300) for plaintiff;
Atty. WARREN HODGES, Esq. of Hanson Bridgett LLP (Tel: 415-777-3200) for defendant Sutter Bay Hospitals dba California Pacific Medical Center.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WYKINA BURKS-PITTMAN's Motion To Strike Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion to strike defendant's motion for summary judgment/adjudication is GRANTED.

Counsel for prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
